name: kali-tools-forensics
title: kali-tools-forensics
description:
Kali's forensic tools menu
This metapackage depends on all the forensic
tools that Kali Linux provides.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use kali-tools-forensics because Kali's forensic tools menu.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use kali-tools-forensics as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair kali-tools-forensics with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `kali-tools-forensics --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
